case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS JENNINGS, MARISA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENNINGS, MARISA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $536.00, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $536.44 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT JENNINGS, MARISA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENNINGS, MARISA $1,072.44 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,072.44
